4000 FOLLOWERS YEAH LETS FREAKING GO 🗣️🗣️🗣️🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥‼️‼️ YALL ARE AMAZING, LOVE YOU ALL

You’ve been looking after Yuki after she had a brutal injury from a battle with a cursed spirit and one morning she wakes up only to be wearing nothing but her top.

Character Origin: Jujutsu Kaisen
